enum_values.name: AboveLine
enum_values.summary: The mark tag is above the line.

enum_values.name: BelowLine
enum_values.summary: The mark tag is below the line.

enum_values.name: MiddleLevelOfSymbol
enum_values.summary: The mark tag is in the middle level of the mark symbol.

enum_values.name: AboveSymbolCenterLine
enum_values.summary: The mark tag is above the center line of the mark symbol.

enum_values.name: BelowSymbolCenterLine
enum_values.summary: The mark tag is below the center line of the mark symbol.

enum_values.name: CustomRelativeToSymbol
enum_values.summary: The mark tag is in a custom location relative to the mark symbol.
